mapper.sql: b.id, b.title, b.content, b.summary, b.author_id, b.category_id, b.tags, b.view_count, b.comment_count, b.status, b.is_top, b.create_time, b.update_time, u.username as author_username, u.nickname as author_nickname, c.name as category_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog b LEFT JOIN user u ON b.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM blog b LEFT JOIN user u ON b.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.status = 1 ORDER BY b.is_top DESC, b.create_time DESC
SELECT FROM blog b LEFT JOIN user u ON b.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.status = 1 ORDER BY b.is_top DESC, b.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT FROM blog b LEFT JOIN user u ON b.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.id ORDER BY b.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT FROM blog b LEFT JOIN user u ON b.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.category_id = #{categoryId} AND b.status = 1 ORDER BY b.create_time DESC
SELECT FROM blog b LEFT JOIN user u ON b.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY b.create_time DESC

SELECT FROM blog b LEFT JOIN user u ON b.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.status = 1 AND (b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY b.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM blog WHERE status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog (title, content, summary, author_id, category_id, tags, status, is_top) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{authorId}, #{categoryId}, #{tags}, #{status}, #{isTop})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, summary = #{summary}, category_id = #{categoryId}, tags = #{tags}, status = #{status}, is_top = #{isTop} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE blog SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE blog SET comment_count = #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
